The Wonderful World of Vipravinodins: The Forgotten Brahmanas of Vijayanagara

# The Wonderful World of Vipravinodins: The Forgotten Brahmanas of Vijayanagara

### Vipravinodins were Brahmanas in the Vijayanagara Era whose profession was jugglery. This essay attempts to trace their chequered history using inscriptional evidence.

[](https://substack.com/@thedharmadispatch)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

THE RISE OF A UNITED HINDU POWER in south India less than two hundred years after the permanent decimation of Hindu political power in *Uttarapatha* is a great civilizational education in itself. It was the first, grand political—in fact, an all-encompassing—Hindu reawakening that happened with conscious intent and was underscored by a definite aim: safeg…
